entities.name: GOVERNMENT OF INDIA
entities.description: The governing body of India that entered into a Memorandum of Understanding with ICRISAT

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute of Semi-Arid Tropics, an organization involved in seed exchange

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where seed movement is regulated

entities.name: NATIONAL PLANT QUARANTINE REGULATIONS
entities.description: Regulations governing the movement of seeds into and out of India

entities.name: DESTRUCTIVE INSECTS AND PESTS ACT 1914
entities.description: The legislative act under which plant quarantine regulations are governed

entities.name: NBPGR
entities.description: National Bureau of Plant Genetic Resources, the authorized quarantine authority

entities.name: ICAR
entities.description: Indian Council of Agricultural Research, the parent organization of NBPGR

entities.name: PQU
entities.description: ICRISAT Plant Quarantine Unit, an export certification laboratory

entities.name: EXPORT CERTIFICATION LABORATORY
entities.description: The designation of PQU for certifying exports

entities.name: IMPORTED GERMPLASM
entities.description: Genetic material imported for research or breeding

entities.name: PESTS AND DISEASES
entities.description: Biological threats monitored during seed quarantine

entities.name: PEQIA
entities.description: Post Entry Quarantine Isolation Area used for seed surveillance

entities.name: MANDATE CROPS
entities.description: The five specific crops whose seed movement is permitted under the MoU
